svg.title: Claude usage data flow: connect by pasting an Admin key into Vault, render through the operation seam over the Anthropic Admin API
svg.desc: Two flows bind the generic app client to the Supabase Edge broker and the Anthropic Admin API. Connect: the connections surface runs the admin_key connect (the user pastes their Admin key, sk-ant-admin) at credentials-store, which stores the high-sensitivity key in Vault and records its id on the connection (access_secret_id); no key ever returns to the device. Render: the widget host needs no platform_key seeding because the widgets are zero-config, so params is the empty instance config; it calls proxy, which gates the connection, serves or fills the cache, and reads the Admin key from Vault server-side; it looks up the per-widget operation in OPERATION_REGISTRY.anthropic_usage on the AOD-56 seam with zero seam edits; the operation builds the cost_report query server-side (the time-derived month-to-date window starting_at and ending_at plus bucket_width 1d), calls the Anthropic Admin API with the x-api-key and anthropic-version headers, and normalizes the raw daily cost buckets (amount is a decimal string in cents) into SpendMtdData or DailySpendData, which the proxy caches and returns. A 401 from a revoked Admin key maps to reauth_required, the new generic credential-death detector. Claude usage has no path token and no option source.
svg.text: Claude usage data flow: paste an Admin key (to Vault), render through the operation seam (Anthropic Admin API)
Edge broker (AOD-9): the only line of trust
Admin key to Vault · no location
gate · cache · Admin key from Vault
Credential death (new generic detector, §3.3): admin_key has no refresh, so a revoked or invalid Admin key returns HTTP 401 on the data call. The shipped generic
mapper sends any non-2xx to upstream_unavailable; this integration adds a one-time per-auth-class refinement that maps a 401 on a credentialed-class call to
reauth_required (409 + a status flip), so the widget shows a "reconnect / re-paste key" affordance instead of retrying a dead key forever. The Admin key is read from
Vault server-side and never reaches the device (AOD-5). Zero-config: no per-instance config, no connection config, no option source, no path token.
